_comment: 接收系第1条·年度版(排播表#2)。主题图/词图/动效逐集逐词定制，本集设计如下。

hook.vi: Chúc bạn năm nay nhận đủ những điều này.
hook.pinyin: yuàn nǐ jīn nián shōu xià zhè yī qiè
hook.themePrompt: an epic radiant golden scene combining: a giant golden koi fish leaping over a sea of clouds at sunrise, an overflowing treasure chest bursting with light, two cherry blossom trees intertwined, a lighthouse beam through golden mist, warm gold and pink palette, movie-poster composition

words.imagePrompt: a giant golden koi fish leaping out of a sea of clouds at sunrise, trailing sparkling water droplets and streams of golden light, sun rays bursting
an ancient treasure chest on a mountain of gold coins bursting open with blinding rays of golden light, coins flying into the air, red silk ribbons
two cherry blossom trees grown intertwined into one, pink petals swirling in warm wind, a single red thread weaving between branches, golden hour light
majestic golden gates opening in the sky above calm sea, a lighthouse beam cutting through luminous golden mist, stairway of light descending, dawn colors

outro.vi: Gõ 'nhận' để nhận hết. Ngày mai: những thứ sẽ tránh xa bạn.
outro.preview: Ngày mai: những thứ sẽ TRÁNH XA bạn
